steps.title: Follow the 2004 time cue
steps.content: The first sentence fixes the action in the past: on March 27, 2004, Haddad retired. The next sentence describes her completed career record at that same time.

steps.title: Reject present and future forms
steps.content: A is present and fails with the singular subject, B implies an ongoing action, and D points to the future. A simple past verb matches the completed retirement. The answer is C.
